title: What is Final Expense Insurance?
description: A smaller permanent life insurance policy for funeral and end-of-life costs.
callout: **Final expense is a permanent life insurance policy designed to cover funeral and immediate end-of-life expenses.**

content.text: **Final expense is a smaller permanent life insurance policy typically intended to cover funeral costs and other end-of-life expenses. Guaranteed payout to helps loved ones pay for a funeral service, burial or cremation, doctor or hospital bills, or other immediate expenses after a death.**

variations: What does final expense insurance cover?
Is final expense the same as burial insurance?
